title: React.js Essentials
description: Build modern, interactive UIs with React. The most in-demand frontend framework right now.
longDescription: React changed how we build for the web. Components, state, props — once it clicks, you'll never want to go back. This course takes you from your first component to building complete, real-world UIs. By the end you'll have the skills that employers are actively hiring for.

lessons.title: What is React?
lessons.description: Understand the component model, virtual DOM, and why React is so popular.

lessons.title: JSX & Components
lessons.description: Write your first React component with JSX. Understand the syntax and how it compiles.

lessons.title: Props
lessons.description: Pass data into components with props. Build reusable, configurable components.

lessons.title: State & useState
lessons.description: Make components interactive with the useState hook. Track and update values over time.

lessons.title: Event Handling
lessons.description: Respond to user actions — clicks, inputs, form submissions — in React.

lessons.title: Lists & Keys
lessons.description: Render dynamic lists of data with map() and understand why keys matter.

lessons.title: useEffect Hook
lessons.description: Run side effects in React — fetching data, subscriptions, timers.

lessons.title: Fetching Data from APIs
lessons.description: Fetch real data with useEffect and display loading states and errors.

lessons.title: React Router
lessons.description: Build multi-page apps with React Router. Dynamic routes, navigation, and URL params.

lessons.title: Project: Build a Movie Browser
lessons.description: Build a complete movie browsing app with search, filters, and a detail page.
